title: malus apiosa
intro: Malus apiosa, also known as the Chinese crabapple or Asian crabapple, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree in the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus apiosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and sore throats, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Malus apiosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves, bark, or fruits in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
